title: docs: Mention mounts.conf location for non-root users

comments.body: Also if you add the tag `[CI:DOCS]` to the title, a lot of the tests won't run in CI.

> Also if you add the tag `[CI:DOCS]` to the title, a lot of the tests won't run in CI.

Is this documented anywhere. Otherwise I guess it'd make sense to add it CONTRIBUTING.md ?

LGTM
@rhafer @vrothberg just spun up a PR this morning for the PR template (#8229) since you've a tweak there @vrothberg, perhaps a quick note in Contributing.md too?
